message:
fix(codegen): Prevent variable shadowing in dict comprehensions

Dict comprehension loop variables now use mangled names (__comp_k_N) to
avoid shadowing outer scope variables. After the comprehension completes,
the renames are cleaned up so outer code sees original variable names.

This matches Python's comprehension scoping semantics where:
  k = "outer"
  d = {k: None for k in range(10)}  # inner k doesn't affect outer k
  assert k == "outer"               # outer k still accessible
